params.name: Linde's Fridge
params.description:
On May 7, 1873 AD, Linde, a German, invented the first freezer with ammonia as the refrigerant.
Linde used a heat engine to create a cooling system by compressing and evaporating ammonia. It was first used in the Sedumar brewery in Wiesbaden for food preservation. [History of Refrigerator] Faraday made ice by using a chemical method 50 years ago. Freezer with pressure pump was invented 20 years ago. Electric refrigerators were invented in the early 20th century.
